items.description: **GeneTind Life Skills** 是一个包含 **1000+ 个 AI Agent 技能**的精选集合，覆盖生物医学与临床研究的完整领域。这些技能专为 [GeneTind]—— 基于 Claude 的个人 AI 助手框架 —— 设计，能将通用 AI 智能体转变为强大的医学与科研研究伙伴。

items.name: scrolling-site
items.description: An immersive web experience that transforms image sequences into interactive scroll-based animations. This project converts your 240-frame animation into a cinematic storytelling journey where each scroll reveals the next frame, creating a fluid visual narrative that responds directly to user interaction.
